rdf:Description.dcterms:bibliographicCitation: Landi, E, 2014, The antiquarian Carlo Alberto Foresti of Carpi, a correspondent of Bernard Berenson: unknown documents for the history of a dispersed collection, in Connors, Waldman, pp. 309-330
rdf:Description.dcterms:title: The antiquarian Carlo Alberto Foresti of Carpi, a correspondent of Bernard Berenson: unknown documents for the history of a dispersed collection
